latency_definitions.stt_latency_ms: First transcript after user_state speaking (approx); if missing, LiveKit user ChatMessage transcription_delay (post end-of-speech).
latency_definitions.tts_latency_ms: tts_node_ttfb (time to first TTS audio chunk)
latency_definitions.e2e_latency_ms: User stopped speaking to agent started speaking (assistant metrics)
